name: Evo-Solutions Inc V2
description:
"They said it was the next step in evolution. They didn't mention the pain, the prisons, or the price of survival."

Severe trigger warning: Death, Suicide, Body Horror, Non-con transformation, and Hopelessness.

What will you do when the world itself seems determined to make your life a living hell?
Don't answer, they don't care.
Welcome to ES-I, a biotech corporation specializing in the "evolution" of the human race! Will you be complicit? Will you fight? Or will you just die on the floor like the hundreds of other people before you?


VOICES OF THE FACILITY:

"It's just science." - The Mad Scientist

"Stop trying, God knows I did." - The Mercenary

"You're happier like this, right?" - The Manipulator

"I'm going to burn the monster I made." - The Saboteur



I highly recommend the use of a proxy with this bot, specifically Deepseek.
It is likely that it won't work very well without it, sorry in advance!

Enjoy.
With love, Zenvii.

(8/10/25 Change Log)
- Added additional sector details
- Added additional details to the transformation process
- Added the "Intake Corridor"

(12/7/25 Change Log)
- Added details to the description for clarification on what this bot is
- Formatting changes for prompt coherency
- Completely rewrote the initial message
creator: Zenvi
